scenario: presentationFor('task') — renderer + action for each task. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
realWorldSource: AKM-native; mirrors the frozen renderer/all-types.json task entry
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. `task` → renderer 'task-yaml'. action = src/core/type-presentation.ts task action: `akm tasks show <id> -> inspect; akm tasks run <id> -> run now; akm tasks remove <id> -> unschedule` (the code strips a leading `task:` from the ref; under the new ref grammar there is no `task:` prefix, so the full ref appears).

nightly-index.yml.label: Task
nightly-index.yml.action: akm tasks show sample-akm-task//nightly-index -> inspect; akm tasks run <id> -> run now; akm tasks remove <id> -> unschedule

two-targets.yml.label: Task
two-targets.yml.action: akm tasks show sample-akm-task//two-targets -> inspect; akm tasks run <id> -> run now; akm tasks remove <id> -> unschedule
two-targets.yml.note: renders normally despite being invalid; presentation keys on type=task, not on validity.
